title: Conduct online transactions in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct online transactions in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Perform online transactions

pcs.text: Confirm workplace requirements for online sale of automotive products and services1.2 Secure online personal authentication information according to workplace requirements1.3 Determine required online functions and processes to supply required automotive products and services 1.4 Report technical difficulties in accessing and using online facilities to online service provider
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm workplace requirements for online sale of automotive products and services1.2 Secure online personal authentication information according to workplace requirements1.3 Determine required online functions and processes to supply required automotive products and services 1.4 Report technical difficulties in accessing and using online facilities to online service provider?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm workplace requirements for online sale of automotive products and services1.2 Secure online personal authentication information according to workplace requirements1.3 Determine required online functions and processes to supply required automotive products and services 1.4 Report technical difficulties in accessing and using online facilities to online service provider.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Perform online transactions

elements.title: Administer online transactions

pcs.text: Complete online transaction and dispatch purchased automotive product or service according to terms of online transaction2.2 Complete records of transactions and maintain according to workplace procedures 2.3 Compare workplace records with online records, and report irregularities according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete online transaction and dispatch purchased automotive product or service according to terms of online transaction2.2 Complete records of transactions and maintain according to workplace procedures 2.3 Compare workplace records with online records, and report irregularities according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete online transaction and dispatch purchased automotive product or service according to terms of online transaction2.2 Complete records of transactions and maintain according to workplace procedures 2.3 Compare workplace records with online records, and report irregularities according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Administer online transactions

elements.title: Review effectiveness of online transactions

pcs.text: Review automotive products and services rendered to determine quality and timeliness of delivery in relation to advertised profile and content3.2 Analyse customer feedback against online transaction history to determine customer satisfaction3.3 Report any issues with service provider to supervisor according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review automotive products and services rendered to determine quality and timeliness of delivery in relation to advertised profile and content3.2 Analyse customer feedback against online transaction history to determine customer satisfaction3.3 Report any issues with service provider to supervisor according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review automotive products and services rendered to determine quality and timeliness of delivery in relation to advertised profile and content3.2 Analyse customer feedback against online transaction history to determine customer satisfaction3.3 Report any issues with service provider to supervisor according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Review effectiveness of online transactions

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
